---
title: "PSYC613 Outline"
---

## Psychology in Practice

PSYC613 runs for six weeks from the beginning of Semester 2.

In this module students choose an applied issue to investigate, focussing on the kinds of problems that occur in professional contexts. Students learn how psychological principles can be applied to real-world problems, and how to use this understanding to make evidence-based recommendations for change at the individual or organisational level.

The content of PSYC613 is under construction, and more details will be added here before the start of the 2026/27 academic year.
